source.title: Patria Investments SEC Filings — 6-K Series (Quarterly Results and Material Events)
source.notes: Series of 6-K filings covering quarterly earnings releases, material acquisitions (Solis, RBR), and AGM proxy materials. As a Cayman Islands-incorporated foreign private issuer, Patria files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) rather than 10-K/10-Q/DEF 14A.
